Title: Celebrate Your Birthday at School Introduction: Birthdays are special occasions that deserve to be celebrated with friends and loved ones. If your birthday falls during the school year, why not bring the celebration to school? This can be a fun way to share your joy with classmates and teachers. However, it's important to plan carefully to ensure everything goes smoothly. Here is a detailed guide on how to celebrate your birthday at school. Step 1: Get Permission Key Tip: Always seek permission from the appropriate authority figures before planning your school birthday celebration. Before you start making plans, ask your teacher if they would allow you to celebrate your birthday in class. Some schools have strict rules about food and decorations, so it's crucial to get their approval first. If they agree, discuss what kind of activities or treats would be acceptable. Step 2: Choose How You Want to Celebrate Guideline: Consider your personality, the classroom environment, and school policies when deciding how to celebrate. There are many ways to celebrate a birthday at school. You could bring snacks for everyone, decorate the room, play games, or do a small presentation about yourself. Think about what would make you happiest and suit your personality best. Remember to keep any potential allergies or dietary restrictions in mind if you decide to bring food. Step 3: Plan Ahead Key Tip: Give yourself plenty of time to prepare for your school birthday celebration. A successful school birthday party requires careful planning. Decide on the details of your celebration well in advance so you have enough time to gather supplies, coordinate with your teacher, and invite guests. Try to finalize your plans at least a week before your big day. Step 4: Gather Supplies Guideline: Make a list of all necessary items for your celebration and check them off as you acquire them. = = = children/CHIDES_NA/NewmanRatner/Interviews/11/7018NB.cha = = = Once there was a humble bird. If you're asking this question, I'm sure that you have access to a periodic table of the elements somewhere (if not, there's one at this site that you can look at) If you look on the periodic table, you will see that there is a number by each element. That number is the "atomic number" and is equal to the number of protons in the atom. If the atom is neutral (not an ion), then there are the same number of electrons as protons. Now, for more difficult things. Imagine the atomic symbol of an element, say Helium, He. Now imagine a little square around the He. The square has four corners, and sometimes there will be numbers in those corners, like: Each of these spots may have a number that tells you something: Let's start with the lower left corner, where the "2" is. This is the atomic number, or the number of protons. Now look at the upper left corner, where the "4" is. This number corresponds to the number of protons plus the number of neutrons. Use the top left to find the number of neutrons. We see that our atom has 2 protons, so we just subtract: 4 - 2 = 2 neutrons. The upper right corner has to do with charge and number of electrons. This may be blank - just think of a blank spot meaning "0." If it is not blank, the number there is how many more protons than electrons that the atom has. This number may be positive or negative (you could have a 3- there, instead of a 3+, for example). In our atom, we have a "1+". That means there is one more proton than electron. Take the number of protons (from the upper left) and use this: 1+ means there is one more proton than electron. There are 2 protons. 2 - 1 is 1, so there is one electron. If the number were negative (Let's say 2-), then you would say "there are two less protons than electrons" and: 2 - (-2) = 2 + 2 = 4 so there would be four electrons in this case. Hope this helps! [moves the table out and brings BLA toward her] Adjacent angles share a side and a vertex. If angles only share a side but not a vertex, they are not adjacent. Adjacent angles can also be described as "next to" or "side-by-side" angles. A word we use often in Geometry is this word Adjacent. You're going to use it in the beginning parts of Geometry and then once you get on Trigonometry as well. We'll hold of on adjacent sides for Trigonometry. But for now the key parts of an adjacent angle that they share a vertex, again the vertex is this point right here I'm going to draw a red dot. So this right here is a vertex. They have a side in common which sets them apart from vertical angles. So the side that these two angles share is that ray right there. So I could say that this angle one and two are adjacent because they share a vertex and they have a side in common. Now if you've been really technical, these two have to be coplanar which means that they're on the same plane. So if I look at this triangle right here where I've drawn in a line segment we only have two adjacent angles. I'm going to write these as 3 and 4. These two angles right here I'll circle them, are not adjacent because they do not share vertex. So you can think of adjacent as kind of a word for next to. " Usually they don't feed me after dinner. Sun it's just like a ma'... why are you turning off the light? And that big hand comes up to twelve. Calculating a test grade is an essential skill for students and teachers alike. By following these steps, you can accurately determine your score on a recent exam or calculate grades for your class. This tutorial will provide in-depth explanations for each step, as well as key tips and guidelines to ensure clarity and practicality. ### Step 1: Gather Necessary Information Before beginning the calculation process, collect all necessary information about the test, including: * Total number of questions (or points) on the test * Number of correct answers or raw points earned * Percentage values for partial credit, if applicable Having this information readily available makes the grading process more efficient and accurate. ### Step 2: Determine Raw Score Calculate your raw score by adding up the total number of correct answers or points earned on the test. For example, if there were 50 multiple-choice questions and you answered 40 correctly, then your raw score would be 40 out of 50. Key tip: If partial credit was given for some questions, make sure to include those points accordingly during this stage. ### Step 3: Convert Raw Score into a Percentage Divide your raw score from Step 2 by the total possible points, then multiply that result by 100 to convert it into a percentage. Using our previous example with a raw score of 40 out of 50, we'd perform the following calculations: (40 / 50) 100 = 80% So, in this case, you have achieved an 80% on the test. Guideline: Some instructors may choose to curve test scores depending on various factors such as difficulty level or class performance averages. Keep that possibility in mind while calculating your grade. ### Step 4: Apply Weighting to Different Components (Optional) If the test consisted of several sections worth different percentages towards the overall grade, apply the appropriate weights after converting each section's raw score into a percentage. Multiply each section's percentage by its assigned weight, then add them together to obtain the final course grade contribution. For instance, suppose a test has two parts - Part A and Part B - which contribute 60% and 40%, respectively, to the overall grade. You scored 75% on Part A and 90% on Part B. To find your combined score, do the following calculations: Part A Contribution: 0.75 0.6 = 0.45 (45%) Part B Contribution: 0.9 0.4 = 0.36 (36%) Total Combined Score: 0.45 + 0.36 = 0.81 (81%) In this scenario, your combined test grade would be 81%. ### Key Tips & Guidelines: 1. **Double-check your work**: Make sure to review your calculations carefully throughout the entire process to avoid any potential errors. 2. **Keep track of extra credit**: If additional points were awarded through extra credit opportunities, account for those when determining both your raw score and overall percentage. 3. **Consult with your instructor**: If you are unsure about any aspect of the grading procedure or need clarification regarding specific policies like curving or late penalties, consult with your teacher or professor directly. By following these comprehensive steps and guidelines, you should now possess a solid understanding of how to effectively calculate a test grade. Applying this knowledge will help promote accuracy and consistency in assessing academic performance. I want no people to recognize me. Studying minerals can be useful for figuring out certain things about a rock. Sometimes the shape or size of the mineral can tell something about the rock as well. For example, minerals in igneous rocks can help figure out how long the rock took to cool down (turn from lava into a rock). Larger minerals mean the rock cooled slowly (probably underground). Smaller minerals mean the rock cooled down quickly (probably above ground, like from a volcano). The type of mineral in a rock can also tell what kind of a rock it is, or what has happened to the rock since it formed. Many rocks are named based on what kinds of minerals they have. = = = children/CHIDES_NA/NewmanRatner/10/5585ME.cha = = = Well we didn't put it up 'til the second half of nineteen ninety-one. Video:What Is Rise Over Run?with Bassem Saad Want to learn about rise over run and what it means? Here, see useful information when trying to figure out rise over run.See Transcript Transcript:What Is Rise Over Run?Hi, my name is Bassem Saad. I'm an associate math instructor and Ph.D. candidate, and I'm here today for About.com to answer the question: What is rise over run? Rise Over RunSo recall that we can draw a line onto the x and y axes inside a plane, and from the coordinates on this line, we can come up with an equation for the line. An important number in the equation is this 'm.' It's so important, it has its own name - it's called the slope; and it's calculated by dividing the rise by the run. Slope and Rise Over RunSo the slope equals the difference in the y value, divided by the difference in the x value. The difference in the y value is called the rise; and the difference in the x value is called the run. You take any two points on the line, and the rise is going to be the height of the first point, subtracted into the height of the second point: that is, y-one, minus y-zero. And the run will be - you take the corresponding x values of the first point and the second point: that is, your initial x value on the x-axis, x-zero, and you subtract that into x-one. So that is x-one, subtracted by x-zero. Example of Rise Over RunSay we want to know the slope of the line going through the points (one, four) and the other point (three, two). Well, the slope is just rise over run; rise is the difference in the y direction. So the first point is (one, four), the y value being four. The second point is (three, two); that means the second y value is two. So you've got two, minus four - that's negative two. And run is just the difference in the x direction. So the first point is (one, four), so the x value is one. The second x value is three. So that's three, minus one, which is two. So rise over run: that's minus two, divided by two - that just equals negative one. So you'll find any line that starts from the upper-left, and moves all the way down to the bottom-right will have negative slope. So now we know what rise over run is. Thanks for watching, and to learn more visit us on the web at About.com. About videos are made available on an "as is" basis, subject to the User Agreement. Title: How to Complete Puzzle 007 in Professor Layton and the Curious Village Puzzle 007 is one of the many puzzles you will encounter in Professor Layton and the Curious Village. This particular puzzle is called "The River Crossing." It's a logic puzzle that requires careful thought and planning. Here's a step-by-step guide on how to solve it: 1. **Understand the Problem**: The problem states, "Four people need to cross a river at night. They have only one flashlight, and the bridge is too dangerous to cross without it. The bridge can hold a maximum of two people at a time. When two people cross together, they must go at the slower person's pace." The four people all take different amounts of time to cross the bridge: Person A takes 1 minute, Person B takes 2 minutes, Person C takes 5 minutes, and Person D takes 10 minutes. Your task is to get everyone across in 17 minutes or less. 2. **Identify the Key Elements**: The key elements here are the differing speeds of the individuals and the limited capacity of the bridge. You need to figure out who should cross together to minimize the total time taken. 3. **Formulate a Plan**: Let's start by getting the two fastest persons (A & B) across first. That would take 2 minutes (the slower person's time). Then, send back the faster person (A), taking another minute. Now, send the other two along with the returned A (B, C, and A together); this would take 10 minutes (C's speed since he is the slowest among the three). Bring back B now; this again takes a minute. Finally, send A and B back together; this last trip also takes 2 minutes. Add up these times, and you get exactly 17 minutes! 4. **Execute the Solution**: Follow your plan methodically. Start with A and B crossing (takes 2 mins), then bring back A (takes 1 min). Next, let B, C, and A cross (takes 10 mins), followed by bringing back B (takes 1 min). Lastly, have A and B return together (takes 2 mins). And there you have it - all four safely across in just under 18 minutes! Key Tips & Guidelines: - Always consider the slowest member when pairing up for crossing. Their speed determines how quickly the duo can move. - Pay attention to who has already crossed. If someone hasn't contributed much yet, prioritize them for future trips. - Remember that sending an individual back doesn't add any extra time but allows more efficient usage of the bridge later on. - Keep track of the remaining time as well as the elapsed time during the solution process. By following these steps carefully and keeping our strategic pointers in mind, you'll breeze through Puzzle 007 like a pro! Are you trying it [hiccup or throat sound]? [turns to another photograph in the animal book it shows baby penguins sitting underneath their mothers] Title: How to Get Rid of Poison Ivy Fast ========================================= Poison ivy can cause an itchy rash that lasts for weeks, so it's important to identify and remove this plant from your property as quickly as possible. This tutorial will guide you through the process of safely identifying, removing, and treating poison ivy using natural methods, as well as preventing future outbreaks. **Table of Contents:** 1. Identifying Poison Ivy 2. Protecting Yourself During Removal 3. Natural Methods for Removing Poison Ivy * Manual Removal * Smothering Technique 4. Chemical Treatments (Optional) 5. Cleaning Up After Removal 6. Soothing Itching and Irritation 7. Preventing Future Outbreaks 8. Key Tips and Guidelines 9. Frequently Asked Questions Step 1: Identifying Poison Ivy ------------------------------ Before attempting removal, make sure you can accurately identify poison ivy plants: * **Leaves**: Poison ivy has three leaflets per leaf stem, with smooth or slightly toothed edges. The middle leaflet usually has a longer stalk than the side ones. Leaf colors vary by season - they are green in spring and summer, yellow-reddish in fall, and reddish during early growth in spring. * **Stems**: New stems often have a hairy appearance due to tiny brown hairs along their length. Older vines may develop woody trunks resembling tree bark. * **Habitat**: Look for poison ivy near fences, trees, walls, and other structures where it can climb; also in open fields, forests, and along roadsides. ![Poison Ivy](https://www.wikihow.com/images/thumb/0/0a/Identify-and-Avoid-Poison-Ivy-Step-1-Version-2.jpg/aid1184655-v4- Come on let's catch the ball. Title: How to Perform the Brainbuster Professional Wrestling Move The brainbuster is a high-impact professional wrestling move that requires strength, technique, and coordination. This guide will walk you through the steps necessary to execute this maneuver safely and effectively. Before attempting any complex physical moves, make sure you have proper training from an experienced professional wrestler or coach. **Step 1: Understand the basics of the Brainbuster** A brainbuster involves lifting your opponent onto your shoulders, then dropping down while simultaneously flipping them forward so they land flat on their back with significant force. It's essential to understand the mechanics of the move before attempting it. *Key Tip*: The primary objective of the brainbuster is to create momentum by using your body weight and leverage to generate power. Always prioritize safety over flashiness when performing such moves. **Step 2: Positioning** Start by standing face-to-face with your opponent. Reach around their waist with both arms, locking your hands together in the small of their back. Your thumbs should be tucked under your fingers to avoid injury during the lift. *Key Guideline*: Make sure your grip is firm but not too tight. Maintaining good circulation prevents unnecessary pain or discomfort for your opponent. **Step 3: Lifting** Lift your opponent off the ground by straightening your legs and driving upward through your heels. Keep your knees slightly bent to maintain balance and absorb some of the pressure placed on your spine. As you raise your opponent, pivot on the balls of your feet and turn sideways to prepare for the next phase of the move. *Key Tip*: Engage your core muscles throughout the entire process to protect your lower back and add stability to the lift. **Step 4: Transitioning into the Brainbuster position** Once you are standing perpendicular to your opponent and holding them securely on your shoulders, adjust your stance if needed so that your dominant foot (the one you prefer to lead with) is closer to your opponent's head. From here, lean backward, keeping your hips directly beneath you, until you feel comfortable enough to proceed with the flip. *Key Guideline*: Be mindful of your own center of gravity as well as your opponent's; sudden shifts can cause instability and increase risk of injury. **Step 5: Execution** To perform the actual brainbuster, quickly thrust your hips forward while releasing your hold on your opponent's waist. Simultaneously bend at your knees and drop down into a squatting position. This motion will propel your opponent upwards and forward, causing them to somersault mid-air before landing flat on their back. *Key Tip*: Practice timing and control; rushing through the movement increases the chance of error and potential harm to either participant. **Step 6: Breakdown & Reset** After executing the brainbuster, immediately break away from your opponent and ensure they are okay. If performed correctly, there should be no need for medical attention, but always double-check to confirm their wellbeing. Once cleared, return to a neutral standing position ready for further action. Remember, mastering the brainbuster takes time, patience, and consistent practice under supervision. Never attempt dangerous stunts without proper guidance and understanding of the techniques involved. [essentially ends activity, as GRA is more intent on being up and moving] B u t t e r f l y yeah. Title: How to Avoid Annoying Others When Instant Messaging Instant messaging is a convenient way to communicate with others quickly and efficiently. However, it can also be a source of annoyance if not used properly. To ensure that your instant messaging experience is positive for both you and your contacts, follow these steps to avoid annoying others when using instant messaging platforms. ### Step 1: Be Mindful of Typing Indicators Typing indicators notify recipients that you are actively writing a message. While they serve as useful cues for conversations, constantly activating typing indicators without sending messages can cause frustration. This behavior may give an impression that you're taking too much time or showing uncertainty while crafting replies. Key Tip: Only activate typing indicators when you have something substantial to contribute within a reasonable amount of time. It shows respect for the recipient's attention and reduces unnecessary anticipation. ### Step 2: Limit Frequent Message Notifications Receiving numerous notifications from one contact can become irritating over time. Excessive messaging might make the other person feel overwhelmed, especially during busy periods. Guideline: Stick to essential communication and refrain from sending multiple messages back-to-back unless necessary. Allow some breathing room between exchanges so that the conversation flows naturally without causing interruptions. ### Step 3: Use Appropriate Language and Tone The language and tone used in instant messages should mirror real-life conversations. Using all caps or excessive punctuation (like exclamation marks) could come off as aggressive or impolite. Similarly, abbreviations and slang popularized by social media platforms might confuse or alienate certain individuals who aren't familiar with them. Best Practice: Opt for clear, concise, and polite language at all times. If humor or sarcasm is involved, consider whether your audience will understand it before hitting send. Remember, written communication lacks verbal and nonverbal cues present in face-to-face interactions, making misunderstandings more likely. ### Step 4: Respect Privacy Settings Most modern instant messaging apps offer privacy settings, such as read receipts, delivery reports, and online status visibility. Ignoring these options could lead to unwanted intrusions into someone's personal space. Suggestion: Understand each platform's unique features and adjust accordingly based on mutual agreement. For instance, turning off read receipts indicates that you won't see when others have read your messages, but similarly, they won't know when you've seen theirs either - fostering a sense of mutual consideration. ### Step 5: Refrain From Sending Unwarranted Media Files Sharing relevant photos, videos, or documents enhances conversations; however, indiscriminately forwarding irrelevant content can clutter up someone else's device storage and data plan usage. Moreover, unexpected explicit or offensive material can create discomfort and negatively impact relationships. Caution: Always think twice about sharing files and only do so if they add value to the ongoing discussion. Also, seek consent prior to transmitting sensitive information, ensuring everyone involved feels comfortable. By adhering to these steps, you demonstrate maturity and courtesy towards others while maintaining healthy and engaging instant messaging practices. Okay how about what lifts this up Mary? You want to give the bottle to the baby? we're going to go to the beach tomorrow. [footsteps can be heard as Bro runs across room] I have seen 'em do that in a show. If the "units" called monomers in a polymer are all the same, then the polymer is called a "homopolymer". Homopolymers are named by adding the prefix poly- before the monomer name from which the polymer is made. For example, a polymer made by bonding styrene monomer molecules together is called polystyrene. How many line segments can be formed by joining the points in Take the numbers 1, 2, 3, 4 and 5 and imagine them written down in every possible order to give 5 digit numbers. Find the sum of the Chin Siang from Tao Nan School, Singapore solved this problem using a Pascal's Triangle method. You are only allowed to move on the surface of the cube and only in the directions of the arrows shown in the sketch. (You might like to mark out a cube and put arrows on all the line segments and mark the numbers of routes for yourself before reading on). How many ways can you get to each `junction point'? Look at the arrows that go towards that point and consider where you might have come from to reach it. To get the number of routes to that point you add up the numbers at the other ends of the segments which have arrows going towards it. Title: How to Understand Good to Know Meaning Introduction: Understanding the meaning of "good to know" is an essential aspect of effective communication. This phrase can be used in various contexts, but its primary purpose is to indicate that the information being shared is useful or interesting, even if it may not have immediate relevance to the conversation at hand. By mastering this concept, you will improve your ability to engage with others, express yourself clearly, and comprehend the true intent behind such statements. Here's a comprehensive guide to help you understand good to know meaning: Step 1: Identify the Phrase Recognize when someone uses the expression "good to know." It typically follows a statement or piece of information that might seem insignificant initially but still holds value or interest. The speaker usually emphasizes their curiosity or appreciation by uttering these words. Once you identify the phrase, move on to Step 2. Key Tips & Guidelines: - Pay attention to phrases like 'that's interesting,' 'I didn't realize that,' or any other expressions indicating surprise or fascination. They often precede or accompany the usage of 'good to know.' - Be mindful of cultural differences as some languages may not directly translate this exact term but convey similar sentiments through different wordings or intonation patterns. Step 2: Analyze Contextual Relevance Determine whether the information disclosed before 'good to know' is pertinent to the current discussion. Sometimes, the content itself isn't crucial; however, understanding it could enrich your knowledge base, broaden perspectives, or foster better connections among participants. If the information lacks direct relevance, proceed to Step 3. Key Tips & Guidelines: - Consider factors influencing conversational direction, including group dynamics, individual interests, and broader objectives (e.g., teaching, learning). - Keep track of related topics discussed during previous interactions, which might provide additional context for seemingly unrelated facts presented under the guise of 'good to know.' Step 3: Acknowledge Appropriately Express gratitude or acknowledgment upon hearing 'good to know.' Responding positively reinforces open communication channels and encourages further sharing of valuable insights. To do so effectively, consider employing one of the following strategies: a) Paraphrase: Confirm your comprehension by rephrasing the information using your own words. For instance, say, "So, just to clarify, you're suggesting that..." b) Validate Emotions: Recognize the speaker's enthusiasm or excitement about the topic. Example response: "That sounds fascinating! I appreciate you sharing that tidbit with me." c) Share Personal Connection: Relate the newfound knowledge to personal experiences or prior learnings. Response example: "Interestingly enough, I read somewhere else that... It seems there's more to explore!" d) Pose Follow-Up Questions: Encourage deeper engagement by asking questions based on the provided information. Exemplary question: "What resources would you recommend for exploring this subject further?" By adopting any of these approaches, you demonstrate active listening skills while fostering meaningful dialogues - critical components of successful interpersonal relationships. In Summary: Comprehending the meaning of 'good to know' entails recognizing its application in conversations, assessing contextual significance, and responding appropriately. Through heightened awareness, empathetic engagement, and thoughtful responses, you transform ordinary exchanges into rewarding intellectual journeys. As a result, both parties benefit from expanded horizons, strengthened bonds, and enhanced communicative abilities. That's why I ran out of control. Title: How to Delete Chats in Microsoft Teams Microsoft Teams is a popular collaboration platform that allows users to communicate through chat messages. While keeping records of conversations can be helpful, there are situations where you might want to delete chats, such as removing sensitive information or decluttering your workspace. This tutorial will guide you through the process of deleting chats in Microsoft Teams with clear instructions, in-depth explanations, key tips, and guidelines. **Step 1: Open Microsoft Teams** To begin, launch the Microsoft Teams application on your device. If you're using the web version, open your browser and navigate to the Teams website and sign in with your credentials. **Step 2: Navigate to the Chat Tab** Once you have successfully logged into Microsoft Teams, look at the left sidebar. You should see several tabs - Activity, Chat, Teams, Meetings, Calls, and Apps. Click on the 'Chat' tab to access all your one-on-one and group conversations. **Step 3: Select the Conversation to Delete** From the list of chats displayed under the Chat tab, locate the conversation containing the message(s) you wish to remove. Left-click on the specific chat to highlight it, indicating your selection. Key tip: Use filters like 'Recent', 'Unread', or search function (magnifying glass icon) at the top right corner to quickly find your desired chat if needed. **Step 4: Open the Context Menu** After selecting the chat, hover over the three dots ('...') located near the chat title at the top center. A context menu will appear providing various options related to managing this particular chat. **Step 5: Choose 'Delete chat' from the Context Menu** In the appeared context menu, click on 'Delete chat'. By doing so, you instruct Microsoft Teams to initiate the deletion process for the selected conversation. Note that once deleted, these messages cannot be recovered. Therefore, ensure you really want to proceed before performing this action. **Step 6: Confirm Deletion** A popup window appears asking for confirmation whether you truly intend to delete the chosen chat. Review any warnings provided by Microsoft about data loss, then select 'Delete' again if you still wish to continue. After clicking 'Delete', the system starts removing the entire conversation history, including both sent and received messages within the selected chat. **Additional Guidelines:** * Only users who initiated or were part of the conversation can delete it. Admins do not have special permissions to erase other people's private chats without their involvement. * When you choose to delete a group chat, only your copy gets removed; others involved will retain their copies unless they also decide to delete them. * Keep in mind that team owners and global admins may have logs available even after individual user deletions depending upon organization policies regarding data retention and compliance. By following these steps carefully, you can effectively manage your communication space in Microsoft Teams by permanently removing unwanted chats while being aware of the implications associated with this action. Teaching Tales: King David and the Spider In this traditional Jewish tale, the former shepherd boy learns that each of God's creatures has a purpose BY: Retold by Aaron Zerah When King David was still a boy watching over his father's sheep, he often came upon spiders' webs strung across tree branches and shining in the sun. David thought the spiders were wonderful to weave such webs, but he could see no use for them. David decided to ask God about it. "Why, O Creator of the world, did you make spiders? You can't even wear their webs as clothing!" God answered David, "A day will come when you will need the work of this creature. Then you will thank me." David grew up and became a courageous warrior. He defeated the giant Goliath and many enemies of the people of Israel. He married King Saul's daughter and the people adored him as the greatest man in the land. King Saul was jealous and afraid of David and sent his soldiers to kill him. David ran away to the wilderness. He hoped King Saul's fit of anger would pass and David would be safe to return. But King Saul's men kept chasing him. At last, the soldiers were very close. David ran into a cave to hide. He heard the footsteps of the men and knew that they would soon find him. David was so afraid, his bones shook and hurt. But then David saw a big spider at the front of the cave. Very quickly, it was spinning a web all the way across the opening. Just before the soldiers came up to the cave, the spider finished the web. As the men started to enter the cave, they ran into the web. "Look," they said, "This web is unbroken. If David were here, he'd have torn the web to pieces. He must be hiding somewhere else. Let's go!" So because of the spider, David's life was saved. David understood that God was wise and thanked God for creating all the creatures, including the spiders. Bringing It Home To Do This Week Imagine you are a spider. Describe the webs you make and what good they are to you and others. That night he had a stomach ache. ah, don't put it in your mouth. All the shoes are going to go together? She trekked through for hours, but eventually, Lucy came across an incredible sight. In front of her, stood a castle made of ice! Lucy felt so small and tiny compared to the ancient castle, but she was excited to explore. She gradually made her way to one of the towers of the castle, and looked inside. Lucy carefully opened the door, and to her amazement, she could see a grand hall filled with pots of the magic liquid, pouring out endlessly. Title: How to Care for an Irish Setter Irish Setters are known for their striking red coats, athletic build, and friendly personalities. They make great family pets due to their gentle nature and eagerness to please. Proper care is essential to ensure your Irish Setter stays healthy and happy. Here's a comprehensive guide on how to care for an Irish Setter: **Step 1: Provide Regular Exercise** Irish Setters are active dogs that require daily exercise. A lack of physical activity can lead to behavioral problems such as chewing or digging. Aim for at least one hour of vigorous exercise per day. This could include running, swimming, fetch games, or hiking. Regular exercise will help keep your Irish Setter physically fit and mentally stimulated. **Step 2: Feed a Balanced Diet** Feed your Irish Setter high-quality dog food appropriate for their age (puppy, adult, senior). The diet should be balanced with proteins, carbohydrates, fats, vitamins, and minerals. Avoid overfeeding as this breed tends to gain weight easily. Consult with your vet if you're unsure about portion sizes or types of food. **Step 3: Grooming Maintenance** The beautiful red coat of an Irish Setter requires regular grooming. Brush them weekly to remove loose hair and prevent matting. During shedding seasons (spring and fall), increase brushing to every other day. Bathing should only be done when necessary as too much bathing can strip natural oils from their skin. Trim nails regularly and check ears for signs of infection. **Step 4: Health Check-ups** Schedule annual veterinary visits for vaccinations, heartworm prevention, and general health checks. Screenings for hip dysplasia and progressive retinal atrophy, common conditions in Irish Setters, may also be recommended. Early detection and treatment of any potential issues can greatly improve your pet's quality of life. **Step 5: Training and Socialization** Start training and socializing your Irish Setter early. They respond well to positive reinforcement methods. Housebreaking might take some time so patience is key. Enroll in obedience classes if needed. Socialize your puppy with different people, animals, environments, and situations to foster good manners and reduce anxiety. **Step 6: Mental Stimulation** Keep your Irish Setter mentally engaged with puzzle toys, scent work, or interactive playtime. Boredom can result in destructive behaviors. Engaging activities can challenge your dog cognitively, enhancing problem-solving skills and reducing stress. **Step 7: Create a Comfortable Environment** Provide a comfortable sleeping area away from drafts and direct sunlight. Use a crate for house training and safety purposes, but do not leave your dog confined for extended periods. Keep toxic substances like certain plants, cleaning products, and human foods out of reach. **Step 8: Love and Affection** Lastly, shower your Irish Setter with love and affection. These dogs thrive on companionship and form strong bonds with their families. Spend quality time together through cuddling, playing, or simply sitting by their side. Remember, a cared-for dog reciprocates with loyalty and unconditional love. By following these steps, you'll have a healthy, happy, and well-rounded Irish Setter. Always remember, owning a pet is a big responsibility - both emotionally and financially. Make sure you're ready before bringing home an Irish Setter. Well she can't sit on the floor. Keep looking at the coin and move slowly backwards until the coin disappears from view. Stay standing in the same place and ask a friend to pour water into the bowl. Expected Result: You will find that you can see the coin again! Explanation: The light from the coin is 'bent' (refracted) by the water so you can see it again. This is a demonstration of refraction. Equipment: Comb, black paper, white paper, flashlight, mirror. Method: Cut a small holes in a piece of card and tape a comb across the hole. In a darkened room, place the card in front of the torch, so that narrow beams of light come through the teeth of the comb. Hold a mirror in the beams of light so that it reflects the light. Move the mirror to a different angle. Expected Result: The angle of the reflected rays will change. Explanation: Light is reflected off the mirror at exactly the same angle as it hits the mirror. This is a demonstration of reflection. Is this the egg over here or is that the egg? [Father came upstairs and dropped some toys in Mary|s drawer] The ones that you all gobbled up with no problem. Formatting a flash drive using the terminal on Linux is a straightforward process that can be accomplished by following these steps: 1. **Insert the flash drive into your computer.** Before you begin, make sure your flash drive is properly inserted into your computer's USB port. This will allow your computer to recognize the device and make it available for formatting. 2. **Open the terminal application.** The terminal is a command-line interface that allows you to interact with your computer's operating system. To open the terminal, search for it in your applications menu or press `Ctrl + Alt + T` on your keyboard. 3. **Identify the flash drive.** In order to format the correct device, you need to identify the flash drive. Hello young explorers! Today, let's dive into a fun and exciting world called "topological spaces." It may sound complicated, but don't worry - we will keep it simple and relate it to things you already know! Imagine a collection of special boxes (which we call "sets") arranged on a table. Each box contains items inside it, like toys, marbles, or stickers. Now, imagine being able to pick any item from these boxes while also making sure that the box containing that chosen item remains open. That means other people should still be able to reach into that same box and choose something else without disturbing your selected treasure. Now, here comes the interesting part: a topological space is said to be "critical" when there exists this magical way of choosing items (we call it an "injective neighborhood selection map"), where each box gets picked exactly once except for one empty box that stays closed. In mathematical language, our choice covers all non-empty boxes, leaving just one lonely, untouched empty box. An example of a critical topological space is an ordered list of items, like toys or books, with a specific rule determining whether a box can remain open or needs to close based on its position in the list. We won't go too deep into those rules now since they involve concepts beyond elementary school levels. But isn't it cool to think that a pile of toys could have secret mathematical properties hiding within them?! Finally, you might wonder if all critical topological spaces are just fancy lists of items like our toy example. Well, my curious friends, the answer lies in further exploration and discovery! Mathematicians are always eager to find out new examples and patterns in various areas, including topology. So who knows - maybe someday YOU will discover a unique type of critical topological space that no one has ever seen before! Happy exploring! How many sides does this triangle have? Title: How to Fill Out the Animal Crossing: New Horizons Friend Code Form Introduction: Animal Crossing: New Horizons (ACNH) is a popular social simulation game that allows players to interact with other users from around the world. To add friends in ACNH, you need to exchange Friend Codes. This tutorial will guide you through filling out the Animal Crossing: New Horizons Friend Code form correctly and securely, ensuring a smooth friend-adding process. Step 1: Access the Friend Code Form To access the Friend Code form, log into your Nintendo Account and navigate to the Animal Crossing: New Horizons community page. Locate the "Friend Code Exchange" section and click on the corresponding link. Key Tips & Guidelines: * Make sure you are logged into the correct Nintendo Account associated with your copy of Animal Crossing: New Horizons. * Only share your Friend Code within trusted communities or with people you know personally to ensure account safety. Step 2: Enter Personal Information You'll be prompted to enter your personal information, including your name, country, and age range. These details help match you with appropriate potential friends who share similar interests and time zones. Key Tips & Guidelines: * Be honest when providing this information, as it aids in creating meaningful connections with other players. * Refrain from sharing sensitive personal data such as full names, addresses, or phone numbers to maintain privacy and security. Step 3: Input Your Friend Code Locate the "Friend Code" field and input the unique 12-digit code found in your Animal Crossing: New Horizons game settings under the "Friends" tab. Sharing your Friend Code enables others to send friendship requests to your game. Key Tips & Guidelines: * Double-check the entered Friend Code for accuracy before submitting the form, as typing errors may prevent successful connection requests. * Keep your Friend Code private and only share it with individuals you trust to avoid unwanted solicitations or potential hacking attempts. Step 4: Add Additional Details (Optional) Depending on the specific Friend Code form used, there might be optional fields asking about your preferred playstyle, favorite activities, or online availability. Filling these sections can further enhance the matching process by connecting you with like-minded players. Key Tips & Guidelines: * While optional, consider completing these fields to increase your chances of finding compatible friends who share similar gaming preferences. * Remember to exercise caution when disclosing any potentially identifying information, even if presented in an optional format. Step 5: Review and Submit the Form Before submitting the Friend Code form, thoroughly review all provided information to ensure its accuracy and completeness. Once satisfied, submit the form to make your Friend Code available for viewing by other interested users. Key Tips & Guidelines: * Always proofread your entries for typos or inconsistencies prior to submission. * Save a local copy of your submitted Friend Code form for future reference, especially if contact information or additional notes were included. Conclusion: By accurately filling out the Animal Crossing: New Horizons Friend Code form, you open up opportunities for exciting interactions and collaborative experiences with fellow gamers worldwide. Implementing best practices throughout this process ensures both enjoyment and security while engaging in the vibrant ACNH community. - The notes C, E and G played together are always a C major chord. - A C major chord is always the notes C, E and G. - Fret that shape on a guitar, and it's always C Major. When you play in a different key, C major's role changes. If you're playing in the key of C major, then C major is the root chord - the I. F is the fourth chord (IV) and G is the fifth chord (V). Lots of simple songs are based on I,IV and V, so you may recognise that set of chords. If you play in the key of G major, then I is G major, IV is C major, V is D major. So, in the key of G when you see "C" on the song sheet, you fret the same shape, and play the same notes as you did when you saw "C" in a song in the key of C. But this time the C is playing a different role. It is the IV. It "feels" different; the listener is waiting for you to return to root chord, G. Look through your songbooks and see if you can spot I,IV and V in other keys. Beginner guitar books tend to use the keys C, G, E, D, A. Edit to add: Here's an analogy. Think of your C major chord as a circle. It doesn't matter where you draw a circle; you always draw it the same way. Seen on its own, it just looks like a circle. A C major chord just sounds like a C major chord. The rest of the piece you're playing defines what that C major chord "does". The key of the piece is a fundamental part of that. Because of the other lines drawn around the circle, it becomes the sun, or a football, or a planet, or a head, or a compact disk, or whatever the artist chooses. In the same way, the other notes you play around your C chord, make it take on different purposes in the music. Why don't you ride your other blue one? Once upon a time, there was a pirate named Pete. He was a very serious pirate and he loved to tie things up. One day, Pete saw a big boat with lots of shiny ropes. He wanted to tie them up! Pete grinned and said, Yay! This is perfect! He quickly grabbed some of the shiny ropes and started to tie them together. When he finished, Pete said, Look at this! Now I am a real pirate! Just then, a little girl on the boat began to laugh. She said, You don t look like a real pirate! Pete was very serious and he frowned. He said, Yes I do! I tied all of these ropes together and that makes me a real pirate! The little girl laughed again. She said, That s not enough! A real pirate needs courage, daring, and more shiny ropes! Pete smiled and said, You re right, let s find more ropes! And they did. Together, they found enough shiny ropes to make Pete an even more serious pirate. This can be anything! (The stranger your beginning sentence, the funnier the final result will be.) - The second person looks at what was written and draws a picture to match the sentence. They fold the paper over so that only the picture can be seen and pass it to the next person. - The third person looks at the picture and writes a caption or sentence for the picture that they see. They fold the paper over again, so that only the sentence can be seen, and pass the paper to the next person. - Continue like this until everyone has had a turn. The game should end with a sentence, not a picture, so it may be that one person has two turns. When everyone has had a turn, open the paper and have a good laugh!! Title: How to Change Your Name in Pennsylvania Introduction: Changing your name in Pennsylvania involves several steps that must be followed accurately. This guide will walk you through the process of legally changing your name in the state of Pennsylvania, providing detailed explanations for each step along with helpful tips and guidelines. Please note that this article does not constitute legal advice and is only intended as a general overview. Step 1: Decide on your new name Before initiating any legal proceedings, decide on the name you wish to adopt. Keep in mind that while you can choose almost any name, there are some restrictions (e.g., avoiding names meant to defraud or mislead). Choose a name that aligns with these requirements. Step 2: Publish notice of name change (if necessary) Pennsylvania law requires publication of a name change if you're an adult seeking to change your own name. However, certain exceptions exist, such as when changing your name due to marriage, divorce, or adoption. To publish notice, run an ad in two newspapers within the county where you reside for three consecutive weeks. Check local rules regarding acceptable publications; typically, ads should appear in both a legal newspaper and a paper of general circulation. Obtain affidavits from the publishers verifying completion of the required notices once published. Key tip: If exempted from publishing notice, gather supporting documentation like marriage certificates, divorce decrees, or court orders reflecting the exemption. Step 3: Prepare Petition for Change of Name Create a petition for change of name using either approved forms provided by the Pennsylvania Prothonotary's Office or draft one yourself following local rules. The document should include essential information like current name, requested new name, reason for the change, residency details, and whether you have ever been convicted of a crime. You may also need to provide social security number, driver's license number, and other identifying details. Guideline: Be truthful and thorough when completing the petition. False statements could lead to denial of your request or even charges of perjury. Step 4: File the Petition File the completed petition at the office of the prothonotary (or clerk of courts) in the county where you live. Pay associated fees which vary depending on location but generally range from $100-$350. Upon filing, you'll receive a hearing date and time before a judge or magistrate. Step 5: Attend the Hearing Appear in court on the assigned date and time. Bring all necessary documents including the filed petition, proof of publication (if applicable), identification, and any supporting materials. Answer questions posed by the judge honestly and respectfully. Key Tip: Dress appropriately for court and arrive early to ensure timely preparation. Step 6: Receive Order Changing Name If the judge grants your request, they will sign an order changing your name. Make sure to obtain certified copies of this order from the prothonotary's office as you'll likely need them to update various records. Step 7: Update Official Records With the signed order in hand, begin updating official records. Start with critical agencies like Social Security Administration and Department of Motor Vehicles. Then move onto others like banks, employers, schools, utilities, insurance providers, voter registration, etc. Remember that different entities might require varying levels of proof, so always carry multiple certified copies of the order. Conclusion: Changing your name in Pennsylvania requires careful attention to detail and patience throughout the process. By following these steps and remaining persistent, you'll soon enjoy life under your newly adopted identity. = = = children/CHIDES_NA/HSLLD/HV3/MT/ethmt3.cha = = = Well you're USTA the sliced ones we always get the sliced ones. oh, he's busy painting all the Easter eggs, huh? Title: How to Deal with Losing a Best Friend =========================================== Losing a best friend can be one of the most difficult experiences to go through. It's normal to feel a wide range of emotions such as sadness, anger, confusion, or even relief. However, there are ways to cope with this loss and move forward. This article will provide you with steps and advice on how to deal with losing a best friend. ### Step 1: Allow Yourself to Grieve * **Explanation:** Grieving is a natural response to any type of loss, including the end of a friendship. Give yourself time to process your feelings and accept that the friendship has ended. * **Key Tips & Guidelines:** + Don't rush the grieving process; everyone heals at their own pace. + Recognize and acknowledge your emotions instead of suppressing them. + Seek support from other friends, family members, or a therapist if needed. ### Step 2: Reflect on the Relationship * **Explanation:** Understanding what led to the breakdown of the friendship may help you come to terms with its ending. Analyzing both positive and negative aspects of the relationship can give you closure and insight for future relationships. * **Key Tips & Guidelines:** + Identify the reasons why the friendship ended without blaming yourself or the other person entirely. Title: Get Free Unlimited Everything on Your Phone Disclaimer: This article is intended for educational purposes only. We do not condone or encourage any illegal activities, including hacking or violating terms of service agreements. Always obtain proper authorization before accessing or modifying any device or network. Introduction: In today's world, mobile phones have become an integral part of our lives. With increasing data consumption and expensive phone plans, many users are looking for ways to get free unlimited everything on their phones. While there aren't any legal methods to unlock truly unlimited services without paying, this guide will explore some alternative options that might help you save money and optimize your current plan. These steps include understanding your usage patterns, utilizing free Wi-Fi networks, taking advantage of carrier promotions, using data compression tools, and managing app permissions. Step 1: Analyze Your Usage Patterns The first step towards optimizing your phone usage is understanding your needs. Monitor your data, call, and text message usage over a few billing cycles to identify trends and peak times. You can usually find this information in your account settings through your carrier's website or mobile application. By analyzing your usage patterns, you can determine which features are most important to you and where you may be able to cut back. Key Tip: Set reminders or alerts when approaching your data limit to avoid overages. Step 2: Utilize Free Wi-Fi Networks One of the easiest ways to reduce data usage is by connecting to available Wi-Fi networks whenever possible. Most public places like coffee shops, airports, and libraries offer free Wi-Fi connections. Additionally, consider setting up a guest network at home to share with visitors, extending your internet coverage without consuming extra data from your cellular plan. Key Guideline: Be cautious when joining unfamiliar networks, as they could potentially pose security risks. Only connect to trusted sources and avoid transmitting sensitive information while connected to public Wi-Fi. Step 3: Take Advantage of Carrier Promotions Mobile carriers often run promotional offers such as free trial periods, discounted rates, or bonus data packages. Keep an eye out for these deals and take advantage of them when they align with your needs. Some carriers also provide family sharing plans or multi-line discounts that can help lower overall costs. Key Tip: Negotiate with your current provider about competing offers from other companies. They may match or beat competitors' prices to keep your business. Step 4: Use Data Compression Tools Data compression applications and browser extensions can help minimize data usage by compressing web pages and multimedia content before they reach your device. Examples include Opera Mini, Chrome Data Saver, and Firefox Lite browsers. These tools can significantly reduce data consumption, especially for users who frequently stream videos or browse heavy websites. Key Guideline: Note that data compression may impact image quality and loading speeds, so it's essential to balance optimization with user experience. Step 5: Manage App Permissions Many apps consume background data even when not actively in use. Regularly reviewing and adjusting app permissions can help prevent unnecessary data usage. Disable automatic updates, location services, and push notifications for apps that don't require constant connectivity. Key Tip: Consider using third-party battery saver or data manager apps to monitor and control individual app data usage. Conclusion: While there is no foolproof method for obtaining free unlimited everything on your phone legally, following these steps can help optimize your current plan and potentially save you money. Remember always to respect copyright laws and terms of service agreements when accessing digital content. [pretends to drink tea and pour more] Title: How to Add Weather to Taskbar in Windows 10 Windows 10 is a versatile operating system with numerous customization options. One such feature allows you to add weather information directly to your taskbar. This can be particularly useful for those who frequently check the weather before planning their day. Here's a step-by-step guide on how to do this: **Step 1: Open Settings App** The first step involves accessing the settings app. You can do this by clicking on the Start button (Windows icon located at the bottom left corner of your screen) and then selecting the gear icon which represents settings. Alternatively, you can press `Win + I` simultaneously to open the Settings app directly. This action opens the gateway to personalizing various aspects of your Windows 10 PC including adding weather to the taskbar. **Step 2: Navigate to Personalization Section** Once you have opened the Setting app, look for the "Personalization" option in the list that appears on the main page or simply click on 'Ease of Access'. Clicking on either will take you to the next stage. Navigating through these menus brings us closer to our goal as they contain all necessary tools required for modifying the appearance and functionality of different elements of Windows 10, including the taskbar. **Step 3: Select Taskbar from Left Menu** On the Personalization page, locate and select "Taskbar" from the menu listed on the left side of the window. Choosing "Taskbar" ensures we are focusing specifically on configuring the taskbar rather than other components like colors, fonts, etc., thereby streamlining our process towards achieving the end result - displaying current weather conditions on the taskbar. **Step 4: Turn On Weather Option Under Notification Area** After selecting "Taskbar," scroll down until you see an entry labeled "Turn system icons on or off." Click on it. In the new window that pops up, find "Weather" among the list of system icons, toggle its switch to ON position if it isn't already. If done correctly, you should now see a small cloud icon appear near the clock section of your taskbar indicating successful activation of the weather function. Key Tip: Make sure Location Services are enabled on your device; otherwise, the weather function may not work properly due to lack of location data needed to fetch localized weather details. To enable Location Services, navigate back to Privacy > Location within Settings and ensure the Allow apps to access your location slider is set to On. **Step 5: Check Your Current Weather Information** Hover over or click the newly added weather icon on the taskbar. A tooltip or full widget respectively will provide you with detailed current weather info along with forecast for the upcoming days based on your location. By following these steps meticulously, you've successfully managed to add weather updates right onto your Windows 10 taskbar! Now, staying updated about changing climatic conditions becomes handier than ever before. Enjoy seamless weather tracking while managing tasks efficiently! Okay should I make some soup too? When discussing the kindergarten classroom, I gave an overview of skills that most children should be able to carry out by the end of their kindergarten year. These skills are the skills that lead to a successful reader. However they are only to be used as a guideline to measure your child's level. The following are skills that children should be able to do at the end of their first grade year. By this age, children should be able to distinguish between individual letters and words. They should be very well aware that letters are placed in a certain order to create words. When read and writing, children should acknowledge that spaces are used to separate words. Students should be aware that knowledge can be gained from text. The students should know basic grammar such as capital letters at the beginning of sentences and end marks at the end. They should recognize different punctuation. By the end of the first grade students should be able to determine how many syllables are in a word. They should be able to combine syllables to make words and break them apart. Students should be using learned phonemic skills to sound out and read words that they do not know. Students should be able to independently read and understand text on their level. First grade students should be able to identify their own troubles in text and ask for help. By the end of first grade, children can read and follow simple directions. Students at this level have an interest in particular books and topics and know what types of print interest him or her. First grade students should be asking questions such as how, when, why, and what if to gain a better understanding of the text. Title: How to Set Up and Use Block VNC Block VNC is a free, open-source remote desktop application that allows you to control another computer over a network or the internet. This tutorial will guide you through the process of setting up and using Block VNC on both the server (the computer you want to access remotely) and the viewer (the computer you'll be using to connect). We'll cover installation, configuration, connection steps, as well as some essential tips and guidelines to ensure smooth operation. **Server Setup:** 1. **Choose an operating system (OS):** Block VNC supports various platforms including Windows, macOS, Linux, and Raspberry Pi OS. Choose the appropriate version depending on your server's OS. You can download it from <https://www.realvnc.com/en/connect/download/vnc/>. 2. **Install Block VNC Server:** Run the installer file and follow the prompts. During setup, select custom options if available and make sure to include any necessary components like the HD Kerberos authentication module. After installation, launch the program. 3. **Configure settings:** Access the Options menu within the Block VNC interface. Here are important settings to configure: * **General**: Change the default password under 'Security'. Enable encryption for added security. Check 'Allow loopback connections' so local users can also connect via Remote Administration. * **VNC Connections**: Configure the listening port number (default 5900), enable auto-selection of secure vnc viewers, and adjust quality settings based on network speed. Title: How to Change a Beneficiary on an EE Bond An Electronic Series EE Savings Bond (EE Bond) is a low-risk investment tool offered by the United States Department of Treasury that can earn interest for up to 30 years. As with many financial instruments, you have the option to designate beneficiaries for your EE Bonds. A beneficiary is a person who will inherit the bond upon your death. If you need to change the beneficiary on your EE Bond, this guide will walk you through the process step-by-step. ### Step 1: Gather Necessary Information Before starting the process, make sure you have all necessary information at hand. This includes: * Your Social Security Number or Taxpayer Identification Number * The serial number(s) of your EE Bond(s) * Full name, Social Security Number or ITIN, date of birth, and current mailing address of both the old and new beneficiaries. Having this information ready streamlines the process and reduces potential errors during data entry. ### Step 2: Access TreasuryDirect Account Navigate to the TreasuryDirect website ([www.treasurydirect.gov](http://www.treasurydirect.gov)) using any standard web browser. Click 'Log In' at the top right corner of the page and enter your account details to access your dashboard. Key Tip: Keep your login credentials secure; do not share them with anyone. Use strong passwords and enable two-factor authentication if available. ### Step 3: Manage Direct Ownership On your dashboard, find the section labeled 'Manage Direct'. Under this heading, click on 'Manage My Individual Ownership' which leads you to the next screen where you can see options like 'Add or Edit Beneficiary'. Guideline: Only individual owners can add or edit beneficiaries. Joint owners cannot perform these actions individually. ### Step 4: Add New Beneficiary Details Click on 'Add or Edit Beneficiary' link. On the following page, select 'Edit Existing Beneficiary' if changing an existing one, otherwise choose 'Add Legacy Beneficiary'. Enter the required personal details including full legal names, SSNs, DOBs, and addresses. Save changes when done. Key Point: You can list multiple beneficiaries but must specify what percentage of ownership each should receive after your passing. The total should always equal 100%. ### Step 5: Review Changes Review all entered information carefully before submitting. Errors could lead to delays or incorrect processing. Once confirmed correct, submit the request. Tips & Guidelines: - It might take several days for the system to update records. Be patient and check back later. - Notify the added/edited beneficiary about the changes made to avoid confusion. - Remember that only individuals can be designated as beneficiaries, not entities such as trusts or businesses. - There are no fees associated with adding or editing beneficiaries on EE bonds. By following these steps meticulously, you ensure that your wishes regarding the distribution of your assets align with your intentions, providing peace of mind for both yourself and your loved ones. Title: How to Cure an Upset Stomach An upset stomach can be caused by various factors such as indigestion, food poisoning, viral infection, or motion sickness. The symptoms may include nausea, vomiting, bloating, gas, heartburn, and abdominal pain or cramping. This article will guide you through simple yet effective methods to alleviate these discomforts. However, if your condition worsens or persists for more than two days, seek medical attention immediately. **Step 1: Rest Your Stomach** Avoid eating solid foods for a few hours until your nausea subsides. An empty stomach allows the digestive system to rest and recover. Drinking clear liquids is recommended during this period. *Key Tip:* Don't force yourself to eat; let hunger return naturally. **Step 2: Stay Hydrated** Drink plenty of fluids to replace those lost due to vomiting or diarrhea. Opt for clear liquids like water, herbal tea, or electrolyte-rich drinks (such as sports drinks). Avoid caffeinated and alcoholic beverages as they can irritate your stomach lining. *Guideline:* Aim for small sips every fifteen minutes rather than large amounts at once. **Step 3: Gradually Reintroduce Food** Start with bland, easy-to-digest foods when you feel ready to eat again. These could be toast, crackers, rice, bananas, or applesauce. Gradually reincorporate other types of food into your diet as your symptoms improve. *Key Tip:* Chew thoroughly and eat slowly to prevent overloading your already sensitive digestive tract. **Step 4: Use Heat Therapy** Apply heat to your abdomen using a heating pad or hot water bottle. This can help soothe muscle spasms and provide relief from abdominal pain or cramps. *Safety Measure:* Make sure the temperature isn't too high to avoid burns. **Step 5: Try Over-the-Counter Medication** If home remedies aren't providing sufficient relief, consider taking over-the-counter medication specifically designed for upset stomachs. Bismuth subsalicylate (Pepto-Bismol) or calcium carbonate (Tums) are common options. Always read and follow the label directions carefully. *Consultation Note:* Consult with a healthcare professional before giving any medicine to children, pregnant women, elderly people, or individuals with underlying health conditions. **Step 6: Manage Any Underlying Conditions** Identify and address any potential triggers of your upset stomach. For instance, lactose intolerance might cause problems after consuming dairy products. Similarly, stress and anxiety could lead to digestive issues. Making necessary lifestyle changes can significantly reduce the occurrence of upset stomachs. *Lifestyle Adjustment Suggestions:* - Eat smaller meals more frequently throughout the day instead of three large ones. - Limit fatty, fried, greasy, and spicy foods. - Practice relaxation techniques like deep breathing, meditation, or yoga. - Ensure proper hand hygiene, especially before preparing or eating food. - Cook meats thoroughly and store leftovers properly. By following these steps, you should be able to manage most cases of upset stomachs effectively. Remember, though, that persistent or severe symptoms warrant a visit to a doctor. Fixed-wing aircraft have long been used as airliners for moving passengers from place to place. Cargo aircraft carry cargo across seas and long distances, and passenger aircraft also carry some cargo. Creating a Seat Out of Ziploc Bags and a Trash Bag Difficulty: Easy Time Required: 30 minutes Here's what you need: * A trash bag (preferably black) * Several gallon-sized Ziploc bags (clear or tinted is fine) * Duct tape (in a color that matches the trash bag) * Scissors * Optional: bubble wrap or foam sheets for added comfort ### Step 1: Gather Your Materials Before starting your project, make sure you have all necessary materials at hand. This will ensure a smoother process and prevent any delays due to missing items. Having everything readily available also reduces the risk of making mistakes during construction. ### Step 2: Prepare the Trash Bag Take your trash bag and lay it flat on the ground. If there are any wrinkles, try to smooth them out as much as possible; this will help create a more stable base for your seat. The size of the trash bag determines the overall size of your finished product, so adjust accordingly based on who will be using it. ### Step 3: Create the Seat Cushion Now we move onto creating the actual cushioned part of the seat. Take your Ziploc bags and fill each one about halfway with air. You don't want them too full because they might burst when sat upon, but you also don't want them completely deflated. Once filled, seal the bags tightly, removing as much excess air as possible without causing them to lose their shape. ### Step 4: Arrange the Ziploc Bags Lay the inflated Ziploc bags evenly across the bottom half of the inside of the trash bag. They should cover most of the area but leave enough room around the edges for taping later. Overlap the bags slightly where they meet to provide better coverage and support. ### Step 5: Secure the Ziploc Bags Using your duct tape, secure the perimeter of each Ziploc bag to the trash bag. Press down firmly to ensure adhesion. Be generous with the amount of tape used here - you want to make sure these bags stay put! Also, try to keep the tape flush with the surface of the plastic to avoid creating uncomfortable lumps under your makeshift seat. ### Step 6: Add Extra Comfort (Optional) For extra comfort, consider adding layers of bubble wrap or foam sheets over the top of the secured Ziploc bags before continuing. Simply cut the material into pieces roughly the same size as the Ziploc bags, layer them on top, then proceed to the next step. ### Step 7: Finish Taping Fold the open end of the trash bag upwards and tape it shut, just like you did with the individual Ziploc bags. Again, press down firmly to ensure proper adhesion. Now flip the whole thing over so that the sealed side is facing downward. Fold the remaining flaps of plastic underneath the seat and secure them with additional strips of duct tape. And voila! There you have it - your own DIY seat made from Ziploc bags and a trash bag. While perhaps not the sturdiest option for extended seating periods, this creation works well in a pinch and can add an element of fun and creativity to outdoor events or camping trips. Just remember to dispose of it properly once done using it! A deacon is a role in the Christian church. The job of a deacon is different depending on the church he or she is a part of. A deacon usually helps to run the church and teaches people about Christianity. Title: How to Create Simple yet Elegant Hairstyles When Running Late for School Introduction: Running late for school can be stressful, but your hairstyle doesn't have to suffer! This wiki-style guide will provide you with several simple yet elegant hairstyles that you can create even when time is limited. These styles are perfect for those mornings when you hit snooze one too many times or simply have overslept. With our easy-to-follow steps, clear explanations, and helpful tips, you'll be able to create these looks quickly and confidently. Section 1: The Classic Ponytail (Estimated Time: 2 minutes) Step 1: Brush Your Hair Gently brush through your hair using a detangling comb or paddle brush to remove any knots and tangles. This ensures that your ponytail will look smooth and sleek. Key Tip: Start by brushing the ends of your hair and work your way up to prevent breakage and damage. Step 2: Gather Your Hair at the Nape of Your Neck Using both hands, gather all of your hair and pull it towards the nape of your neck. Make sure there are no loose strands around your face or ears. A tight grip on the hair will help avoid bumps and keep your ponytail looking polished. Step 3: Secure the Ponytail with an Elastic Band Choose an elastic band that matches your hair color or blends well with your locks. Loop the band around your gathered hair twice to ensure it stays secure throughout the day. For added volume, gently tug on sections of your ponytail after securing it with the elastic band. Step 4: Final Touches Smooth down flyaways using hairspray or a lightweight styling cream. If desired, wrap a small section of hair around the elastic band and secure it with a bobby pin for a more sophisticated finish. Section 2: The Quick Braided Bun (Estimated Time: 3 minutes) Step 1: Brush Your Hair Thoroughly Brush through your hair as described in Section 1, Step 1. Smoothness is essential for this style to look its best. Step 2: French Braid a Small Section of Hair Starting at your forehead, begin a standard three-strand braid using only the front portion of your hair. As you move toward the back of your head, incorporate additional sections of hair into the braid until you reach the crown of your head. Once all of your hair has been incorporated into the braid, continue braiding normally down to the ends. Step 3: Form a Low Bun Loosely twist the completed braid around itself to form a low bun near the nape of your neck. Use bobby pins to hold the bun in place. Don't worry about making it perfectly neat; slight imperfections add character to this casual yet chic style. Step 4: Hide the Ends of the Braid Tuck any remaining tail end pieces under the formed bun and secure them with additional bobby pins if necessary. Finish off with hairspray to tame flyaways and maintain your hairstyle throughout the day. Conclusion: These two quick and easy hairstyles offer versatile options for students who find themselves running late for school. Both styles require minimal effort while still providing a polished appearance. By following the provided steps and helpful tips, you'll be able to master these looks in no time-even when every second counts! With just only five and five cats! The process of selection is carried out in two phases that span a two-year period. The process starts when a city wanting to host the games applies to its country's Olympic group. One for me and one for you. Neutrinos are very difficult to detect. They are very unlikely to collide (interact) with other particles as they travel through space or through matter. Electrons have an electric charge, but neutrinos do not. This means that neutrinos are unaffected by the electromagnetic force. The first detectors built to find neutrinos observed only 10 or 15 each year. Recent detectors use tanks that contain about a thousand tons of water or other liquid, which lets them detect about 10 to 100 neutrinos per day. The libertarian Murray N. Rothbard said that it would be wrong to kill someone for stealing a pack of gum. If you steal gum, this is an act of violence against the property owner. The owner has a right to use defensive violence to get the gum back, but killing the thief goes too far. That is too much force because it is not equal to the force used by the thief. Punishment must be equal to the crime.
